COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Karen Uchiyama, Esq. for Plaintiff: 1470 California Street LP.
Plaintiff's Witness: Philip Tam, was sworn and direct examined.
Defendant: Lynn Blythe, present in pro per.
Parties have settled, terms not read into the record.
Stipulation signed by the parties not filed.
Matter is deemed settled, Trial Date vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Off Calendar
